intelligence and material consciousness will never be happy. One must judiciously understand the
activities of material nature. As stated in Bhagavad Gita, Prakrute Kriyamanani, Gunai Karmani Sarvasaha,
Ahankara Vimudha Atma Kartaha Mitimanyate, the bewildered spirit soul under the influence of the three modes
of material nature thinks himself to be the doer of activities which are in actuality carried out by
nature. Although one follows the dictations of material nature, he happily thinks himself the
master or husband of material nature. Scientists, for example, try to be the masters of material
nature life after life, not caring to understand the Supreme Personality under whose direction
everything will go. Prakrute Kriyamanani, Gunai Karmani Sarvasaha, Gunai Karmani Sarvasaha, Ahankara
Vimudha Atma Kartaha Mitimanyate, the bewildered spirit soul under the influence of the three modes

The living entity in material nature thus follows the ways of life and joins the three modes of material nature.
This is due to his association with the material nature. Thus he meets with good and evil amongst various species.
Thus, if one fully engages in temporary fruitive activities and does not solve this real problem, what profit will he gain?
